user_question: Identifier les communes où la dette (champ 'D001') a augmenté de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024.
gold_sql: WITH dette_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), dette_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT d23.city_name, d23.valeur AS dette_2023, d24.valeur AS dette_2024, ROUND((d24.valeur - d23.valeur) * 100.0 / d23.valeur, 2) AS evolution_pct FROM dette_2023 d23 JOIN dette_2024 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d24.valeur > d23.valeur * 1.10;
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND er.value IS NOT NULL
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM documents d2
    JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d2.document_id = er2.document_id AND er2.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    WHERE d2.document_year = '2024' AND er2.value IS NOT NULL
    AND CAST((CAST(er2.value AS REAL) - CAST(er.value AS REAL)) / CAST(er.value AS REAL) * 100 AS REAL) > 10
)
reasoning_quality_gen: La logique est incorrecte car la requête compare les valeurs de dette de 2023 et 2024 pour chaque commune, mais elle ne garantit pas que les deux valeurs proviennent de la même commune. user_question: Quelles communes ont vu leur dette (D001) augmenter de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024 ?

)

user_question: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (DF01) augmenter de plus de 15% entre 2023 et 2024 ?

user_question: Communes où les dépenses totales dépassent 120% des recettes totales en 2024 (somme RF01 + RI01 vs DF01 + DF011).
gold_sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN (SELECT document_id, SUM(CASE safir_field_id WHEN 'RF01' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) WHEN 'RI01' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_totales, SUM(CASE safir_field_id WHEN 'DF01' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) WHEN 'DF011' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS depenses_totales FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id IN ('RF01','RI01','DF01','DF011') AND value <> '' GROUP BY document_id) e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND depenses_totales > 1.2 * recettes_totales

SELECT d.city_name
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er_rf01 ON d.document_id = er_rf01.document_id AND er_rf01.safir_field_id = 'RF01'
JOIN extraction_results er_ri01 ON d.document_id = er_ri01.document_id AND er_ri01.safir_field_id = 'RI01'
JOIN extraction_results er_df01 ON d.document_id = er_df01.document_id AND er_df01.safir_field_id = 'DF01'
JOIN extraction_results er_df011 ON d.document_id = er_df011.document_id AND er_df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'

HAVING SUM(CAST(er_rf01.value AS REAL)) + SUM(CAST(er_ri01.value AS REAL)) > 1.2 * (SUM(CAST(er_df01.value AS REAL)) + SUM(CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL)))

user_question: Communes dont le ratio dette/recettes (D001/RF01) dépasse 1.5 en 2024.
gold_sql: SELECT d.city_name FROM (SELECT d.document_id, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS dette, MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS recettes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','RF01') GROUP BY d.document_id) AS sub JOIN documents d ON sub.document_id = d.document_id WHERE sub.dette / sub.recettes > 1.5 GROUP BY d.city_name;
generated_sql:
SELECT d.city_name
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results dr_d001 ON d.document_id = dr_d001.document_id AND dr_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001'
JOIN extraction_results dr_rf01 ON d.document_id = dr_rf01.document_id AND dr_rf01.safir_field_id = 'RF01'
